data.title: Interactive Brokers (NASDAQ: IBKR) stock up after Q2 earnings report. Beat estimates with 51 cents/share, $1.48B revenue.
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) disclosed its Q2 financial results following Thursday's market close. The company posted earnings of 51 cents per share, surpassing the anticipated 45 cents per share. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.48 billion, exceeding the expected $1.36 billion and marking a rise from the previous quarter revenue of $1.23 billion. More details can be found on the Benzinga website.

data.title: Cohen & Steers reports Q2 2025 results on July 17th. Earnings released for quarter ending June 30, 2025. Conference call on July 18th.
data.description: Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced its financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The earnings report and presentation can be accessed at Cohen & Steers' official website, www.cohenandsteers.com, under "Company—Investor Relations—Earnings Archive." A conference call is scheduled for tomorrow, July 18, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to delve into these figures. For more information, the full story is available for viewing on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bank OZK reports record Q2 2025 earnings with $178.9M net income, a 3.1% increase from 2024, EPS at $1.58.
data.description: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on July 17, 2025, Bank OZK (Nasdaq: OZK) reported a record net income available to common stockholders of $178.9 million for the second quarter of 2025, marking a 3.1% rise from the $173.5 million reported in the second quarter of 2024. The first six months of 2025 saw a net income available to common stockholders of $346.8 million, reflecting a 0.5% increase from the $345.0 million recorded in the first six months of 2024. Diluted earnings per common share for the second quarter of 2025 reached a record $1.58, showing a 3.9% increase from the $1.52 reported in the second quarter of 2024. Furthermore, the EPS for the first six months of 2025 was $3.05, demonstrating a 0.7% increase from the $3.03 noted in the first six months of 2024.

data.title: VOC Energy Trust announces $1.87 million distribution for Q2 with $0.11 per unit payment to unitholders on Aug 14, 2025.
data.description: VOC Energy Trust (NYSE Symbol — VOC) recently declared the Trust distribution of net profits for the quarterly payment period ending June 30, 2025. Unitholders recorded on July 30, 2025, are set to obtain a distribution worth $1,870,000, equating to $0.11 per unit, scheduled for payment on August 14, 2025. During this period, the sales volumes were as follows: Oil (Bbl) at 115,025, Natural gas (Mcf) at 52,514, and Total (BOE) at 123,777. The average sales prices and net profits for this payment period were not provided in the excerpt.

data.title: Clarus Corporation to hold Q2 conference call on July 31, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss financial results.
data.description: Salt Lake City, on July 17, 2025 - Clarus Corporation (NASDAQ: CLAR), a worldwide company targeting outdoor enthusiasts, is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, July 31, 2025, at 5:00 pm Eastern Time. The call will address financial outcomes for the second quarter finishing on June 30, 2025. Following the conference call, financial results will be disclosed in a press release after the regular stock market closing hours on the same day.

data.title: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. to hold conference call on 3rd quarter 2025 results on August 7, 2025, led by President & CFO. Join via phone or webcast. Details on hpinc.com.
data.description: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET to review their fiscal third quarter 2025 results. The call will be headed by President and CEO John Lindsay alongside Senior Vice President and CFO Kevin Vann. For those interested, the earnings release and presentation will be accessible on hpinc.com. Investors have the option to participate in the call either through phone participation or by joining the audio webcast. This event provides a chance to gain insights into Helmerich & Payne, Inc.'s performance during the fiscal third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems is remarketing $29.0 million of Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds, with $1.0 million to be redeemed.
data.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. ("Casella"), a company specializing in regional solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, has announced the commencement of the remarketing process for $29.0 million in Finance Authority of Maine Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds. These bonds, known as Series 2015R-1 and Series 2015R-2, were initially issued with a total principal amount of $30.0 million. Casella intends to redeem $1.0 million of the bonds on August 1, 2025, leaving $29.0 million to be remarketed on the same date as the "Remarketed Bonds."

data.title: South Plains Financial increases quarterly cash dividend to $0.16 per share, a 7% rise from previous, payable on August 11.
data.description: In Lubbock, Texas, on July 17, 2025, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI), the company behind City Bank, reported a new development. The Board of Directors has decided on a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per common stock share. This marks a 7% boost from the last dividend announced in April 2025. Shareholders as of record on July 28, 2025, will receive the dividend on August 11, 2025.

data.title: nVent appoints Diane Leopold to its board of directors, bringing utility sector experience. NYSE:NVT.
data.description: In a recent announcement from London, nVent Electric plc (NYSE:NVT) revealed the addition of Diane Leopold to their Board of Directors. Leopold, the former Executive Vice President and COO of Dominion Energy, Inc., joins the nVent team bringing with her valuable experience from the utility sector. Her appointment is effective immediately and is expected to aid nVent as they enhance their concentration on electrical infrastructure, particularly power utilities. This move showcases nVent's commitment to strengthening its leadership with industry experts, highlighting their dedication to growth and innovation.

data.title: KBR secures 2-year renewal of EPCM contract with Basra Oil Company for Majnoon Oil Field in Iraq.
data.description: KBR successfully renewed its contract with Basra Oil Company for providing engineering, procurement, and construction management services for the Majnoon Oil Field. This contract renewal will cover a specific period and is crucial for the ongoing operations at the field. KBR's expertise will continue to support the development and maintenance of infrastructure at the oil field, contributing to the efficient extraction and processing of oil. This contract renewal signifies a continued partnership between KBR and Basra Oil Company, ensuring the smooth functioning of operations in the field.

data.title: Bitfinex boosts trading with Version 1.118 update featuring UI upgrades, navigation improvements, bug fixes.
data.description: Bitfinex has rolled out Version 1.118, which introduces various UI enhancements and performance improvements. The update includes upgraded navigation features and bug fixes aimed at enhancing the trading experience for users.

data.title: AWG Crypto launches XRP cloud mining app, offering mining of XRP, Dogecoin, etc. Users can earn $12 registration reward and $0.6/day.
data.description: AWG Crypto has released a new mobile app for cryptocurrency mining, allowing users to mine Ripple (XRP), Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Litecoin, and other digital assets without hardware or expertise. The app uses cloud infrastructure in global data centers, requiring only a smartphone to register and start earning daily returns. New users receive $12 in experience points to begin mining XRP, lowering the barrier for entry. AWG Crypto also introduced a daily sign-in reward system, offering stable and uninterrupted income for users. The app aims to make mining more accessible and profitable for all users.

data.title: Netflix sees a surge in net income, reaching $3.1 billion.
data.description: The latest data reveals that over 10,000 new cases of COVID-19 were reported in the country within the past 24 hours. Additionally, there were approximately 250 new COVID-19 related deaths during the same time period. These numbers highlight the ongoing challenges in controlling the spread of the virus and the importance of following safety guidelines. The total number of confirmed cases in the country has now surpassed 500,000, with the death toll exceeding 10,000. Authorities continue to emphasize the need for vigilance and adherence to preventive measures to curb further transmission of the virus.

data.title: Australia sees emergence of Bitcoin-backed mortgages in response to housing crisis, as Block Earner introduces new path to property market after regulatory approval.
data.description: Block Earner in Australia has introduced a novel Bitcoin-supported mortgage option, paving the way for individuals to enter the property market through cryptocurrency-backed lending. This initiative follows a recent regulatory approval marking a significant milestone in the financial sector. With this development, individuals can now utilize Bitcoin to secure a mortgage, ultimately revolutionizing the traditional property ownership process.

data.title: UDR, Inc. named 2025 Top Workplaces Industry Winner. Company's page: https://topworkplaces.com/company/udr/.
data.description: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, was recognized as a 2025 Top Workplaces winner in the Real Estate Industry. The company's dedication to fostering a positive workplace culture is showcased on their Top Workplaces page: https://topworkplaces.com/company/udr/. UDR is honored to receive this industry distinction, underscoring their commitment to providing a great work environment.

data.title: Orion Properties Inc. confirmed receipt of a revised unsolicited offer from Kawa Capital Management to acquire outstanding shares for $2.75 each.
data.description: Orion Properties Inc. (NYSE: ONL) has received a new unsolicited offer from Kawa Capital Management, Inc. to potentially buy all remaining shares for $2.75 each. This offer comes after Kawa's initial proposal on June 20, 2025. The offer is non-binding, and if accepted, Kawa would acquire all outstanding shares not in their possession. Orion is currently reviewing the proposal.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE: KREF) declares $0.40625 dividend per share for Series A preferred stock, totaling $1.625 annually.
data.description: In New York, KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (NYSE: KREF) has revealed that its Board of Directors approved a dividend of $0.40625 for every share of its 6.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, equating to an annual dividend of $1.625 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 15, 2025, to preferred stockholders of record as of August 29, 2025. KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc., commonly known as KREF, is the entity behind this dividend declaration.
Trump Budget Director Vought: I expect a good rescissions House vote tonight or tomorrow.

data.title: BigBear.ai to release Q2 2025 results on Aug 11; earnings call at 4:15 pm ET. NYSE: BBAI, provider of AI for defense.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a key player in delivering AI solutions for defense and national security, revealed its plans to unveil the financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on Monday, August 11. The announcement is set to be made around 4:15 pm ET, followed by an earnings call scheduled for the same day. Investors can access the earnings release through the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.bigbear.ai. Further specifics regarding the earnings call will be disclosed closer to the event.

data.title: US House approves three significant crypto bills with bipartisan support, amidst Democrat criticism on corruption concerns.
data.description: Three legislative bills related to cryptocurrencies supported by Republicans were successfully passed with bipartisan backing despite facing opposition from Democrats concerned about alleged corruption and ethical concerns.
